phases.title: Source row-count inventory
blockingIssues: Real production or production-rehearsal source row-count inventory has not been captured.
nextActions: Run source inventory against the agreed source snapshot and attach the generated source-row-counts.tsv.

phases.title: Target PostgreSQL schema and row-count preflight
blockingIssues: Real target PostgreSQL preflight has not been captured.
nextActions: Run target preflight against the production-rehearsal PostgreSQL database and attach target-schema-inventory.txt plus target-row-counts.tsv.

phases.title: Source/target row-count comparison
blockingIssues: Real source/target row-count comparison output has not been attached.
nextActions: Attach row-count-comparison.json and row-count-comparison.tsv from the rehearsal report directory.

phases.title: Critical-table checksum comparison
blockingIssues: Critical table checksum SQL has not been filled with real production-rehearsal data.
nextActions: Fill checksum SQL for agreed critical tables and attach checksum-comparison.json plus checksum-comparison.tsv.

phases.title: Target PostgreSQL runtime smoke
blockingIssues: Current committed runtime smoke is for the test host and does not replace production-rehearsal target smoke.
nextActions: Run smoke-postgres-runtime against the production-rehearsal target and attach the generated report.

phases.title: Database rollback rehearsal linkage
blockingIssues: Rollback rehearsal evidence has not been linked to the database migration rehearsal.
nextActions: Attach rollback rehearsal evidence that covers PostgreSQL backup and restore for the same migration window.

releaseRule: Do not mark this evidence READY until source inventory, target preflight, row-count comparison, checksum comparison, target PostgreSQL runtime smoke, and rollback linkage are all READY with non-template evidence.
